A Legacy You Can Walk On

Daroots weaves a legacy you can walk on: hand-tufted, hand-knotted, flat-weave, handloom and coir rugs made by hand in Kanpur, India, and exported to homes, hotels, and galleries in 40+ countries. Every handcrafted rug is a legacy meant to be lived on and handed down.

Our Collections

Hand Tufted Rugs Hand Knotted Rugs Flat Weave Rugs Handloom Rugs Coco & Coir Rugs
